[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000110100 3
1 000011000 2
2 001110001 4
3 101111000 5
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 111100010 5
7 010110101 5

01 10 010100000 2
12 21 000100000 1
23 32 001100000 2
34 43 000100000 1
45 54 000010000 1
56 65 000010000 1
67 76 001110000 3
70 07 101100000 3

02 20 001100000 2
13 31 010100001 3
24 42 000100000 1
35 53 000000000 a match 4 5
46 64 000110000 2
57 75 000011000 2 match 1
60 06 001100000 2
71 17 000110000 2

03 30 011100010 4
14 41 000110100 3 match 0
25 52 000001000 1
36 63 001100001 3
47 74 000110000 2
50 05 000000000 a match 4 5
61 16 000110001 3
72 27 001101000 3

04 40 000100000 1
15 51 000010000 1
26 62 001100000 2
37 73 001100000 2
